name: Access to Critical Private Variable via Public Method
description: The product defines a public method that reads or modifies a critical private variable without proper validation, allowing attackers to manipulate internal state to unexpected values or expose sensitive information.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL(class) has STORAGE(private_critical_variable) accessible through a public TRANSFORM(getter_or_setter_method) without CONTROL(input_validation) or AUTH(caller_authorization). Look for public methods that expose or mutate security-critical private state without checks.
